name: @cozanet/core
description: Core kernel and low-level resource management.

name: @cozanet/ceo
description: Chief Executive Orchestrator coordinating all swarms.

name: @cozanet/memory
description: Decoupled multi-tiered and vector memory system.

name: @cozanet/security
description: Asymmetric encryption and engine isolation engine.

name: @cozanet/groq
description: Multi-key rotating Groq API client execution layer.

name: @cozanet/plugins
description: Runtime plugin sandboxing and validation framework.

name: @cozanet/agent
description: Dynamic agent runner, lifecycle and behavior state trees.

name: @cozanet/perception
description: Perceptual stream parsing for audio, video and textual events.

name: @cozanet/action
description: Secure tool caller and external API runner.

name: @cozanet/cli
description: Command line interface for direct system access.

name: @cozanet/db
description: State transaction and time-series database wrapper.

name: @cozanet/analytics
description: Engine performance and cognitive trace profiling tool.

name: @cozanet/auth
description: Agent/User identity verification and permissions validator.

name: @cozanet/registry
description: Dynamic engine registry and service ledger.
